versions.version_description: This version isn't in the right key, because it's for beginners. When I started playing guitar, G was the easiest key to play in.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
ok this isn't perfect but it works and it's close...

this is the cello part if u want to pick it

[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                               [ch]F#m[/ch]
e:-----5---5-----------5---5-----------5---5-----------5---5--------:
B:---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7--:
G:-7-----------7---7-----------7---6-----------6---6-----------6----:
D:------------------------------------------------------------------:
A:------------------------------------------------------------------:
E:------------------------------------------------------------------:[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]
e:-----7---7-----------7---7-----------7---7-------3---3--------:
B:---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---7---3---3---3---3--:
G:-4-----------4---4-----------4---4-----------4-----------4----:
D:--------------------------------------------------------------:
A:--------------------------------------------------------------:
E:--------------------------------------------------------------:[/tab]

(keeps repeating throughout)


chords:

Verse 1
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
I need another story [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#m[/ch]

[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]

I've been on the brink, so

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
